name: Pleo
description: Monitor Pleo expense management for company spending controls and access compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Pleo at https://app.pleo.io
2. Go to Settings → Integrations → API
3. Generate an API token
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Pleo Settings → Integrations → API

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Pleo company members and their expense management access

checks.name: Secure Secrets
checks.description: Verifies Pleo spending controls and expense policies are configured
